footer.description: Use these controls to move forward or backward through the steps.
footer.title: ➡️ Navigation

getStarted.description: Click “Start” to begin shaping your MVP from idea to structure.
getStarted.title: 🚀 Let’s get started

headerSteps.description: This flow guides you from idea to MVP, step by step, with a clear sense of progress.
headerSteps.title: ✔️ Your progress

stepRequirements.description: List and prioritize the core features your MVP needs to succeed.
stepRequirements.title: 📝 Define requirements

stepReview.description: Validate your flow, remove friction, and polish the overall experience.
stepReview.title: 🔍 Review and refine

stepWireflows.description: Sketch simple screens to visualize how users move through your product.
stepWireflows.title: 🧩 Build wireflows

interactiveScreens.description: Click, scroll, and explore the screens just like on a real device.
interactiveScreens.title: 👆 Interact with screens

screenSelector.description: Switch between the different mobile screens in your board preview.
screenSelector.title: 📱 Screen selector

addRequirementButton.description: Click here to create a new requirement manually.
addRequirementButton.title: ➕ Add requirement

chatInput.description: Describe features in natural language and let your board turn them into requirements.
chatInput.title: 💬 Describe it in words

requirementsList.description: View and manage all the requirements for your product in one place.
requirementsList.title: 📝 Requirements list

chatInput.description: Use the chat to generate a usability review based on proven heuristics.
chatInput.title: 💬 Get a review from chat

reviewMode.description: Explore your board and wireflows in read-only mode to preserve the design.
reviewMode.title: 👀 Review mode

chatContainer.description: Create screens and components using simple natural language.
chatContainer.title: 💬 Build with chat

editMode.description: Switch back to editing to add or adjust screens and components.
editMode.title: ✏️ Edit mode

previewMode.description: Enter preview mode to experience the flow as a real user.
previewMode.title: 👀 Preview experience

wireflowCanvas.description: This is where screens and components connect to form user flows.
wireflowCanvas.title: 🧩 Wireflow canvas

zoomControls.description: Zoom in to focus on details or zoom out to see the full journey.
zoomControls.title: 🔍 Zoom controls

actionsAndNavigation.description: Define interactions and connect screens for preview mode.
actionsAndNavigation.title: 🔗 Actions & navigation

addComponentCard.description: Click a component to instantly place it on the canvas.
addComponentCard.title: ➕ Add a component

addScreenButton.description: Click here to add a new mobile screen to your board.
addScreenButton.title: 📱 Add a screen

boardCanvas.description: Drag, resize, and position components freely on your board.
boardCanvas.title: 🧩 Board canvas

componentLibrary.description: Browse all available components you can add to your board.
componentLibrary.title: 🗂️ Component library

componentSettings.description: Customize the selected component’s properties here.
componentSettings.title: ⚙️ Component settings

boards.description: Access and manage all your boards and projects here.
boards.title: 🗂️ Boards

createBoard.description: Start something new by creating your first board.
createBoard.title: ➕ Create a board

mainNavigation.description: Use this sidebar to access all main areas of the app.
mainNavigation.title: 🧭 Main navigation

ready.description: Open your board and start building your product.
ready.title: 🎉 You’re ready

teamMembers.description: Invite people and manage team access.
teamMembers.title: 👤 Team members

teamSwitcher.description: Switch between teams or create a new one anytime.
teamSwitcher.title: 👥 Team switcher

yourAccount.description: View your profile, leave the team, or log out.
yourAccount.title: 🙋 Your account

yourBoards.description: This is where all your boards live.
yourBoards.title: 📌 Your boards
